generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

enum ClaimType {
  JUDGEMENT_PATTERN
  VALUE
  INTERACTION_PREFERENCE
  EMOTIONAL_TENDENCY
  RELATION_RHYTHM
}

enum ClaimStatus {
  CANDIDATE
  WEAK
  STABLE
  CORE
  DEPRECATED
}

enum EvidencePolarity {
  SUPPORT
  CONTRA
  NEUTRAL
}

model Conversation {
  id                     String                  @id @default(uuid())
  title                  String?
  summarizedAt           DateTime?
  /**
   * 默认世界状态（地点/时区/语言等），用于意图补全与推理前提，不写入记忆
   */
  worldState             Json?
  createdAt              DateTime                @default(now())
  updatedAt              DateTime                @updatedAt
  messages               Message[]
  dailyMoments           DailyMoment[]
  dailyMomentSuggestions DailyMomentSuggestion[]
  dailyMomentSignals     DailyMomentSignal[]
}

model Message {
  id             String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId String
  conversation   Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  role           String // 'user' | 'assistant'
  content        String       @db.Text
  tokenCount     Int? // D1: 该消息的估算 token 数（assistant 消息记录 LLM 实际输出 token）
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
}

model Memory {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  type             String // 'mid' | 'long'
  category         String   @default("general") // 'identity_anchor' | 'shared_fact' | 'commitment' | 'correction' | 'soft_preference' | 'general'
  content          String   @db.Text
  shortSummary     String?  @db.Text // 50-100 token 简短摘要，注入时优先使用（Phase3 可选）
  sourceMessageIds String[] // PostgreSQL array for traceability
  confidence       Float    @default(1)

  // 衰减相关
  hitCount       Int      @default(0) // 被召回/引用次数
  lastAccessedAt DateTime @default(now()) // 最后一次被召回的时间
  decayScore     Float    @default(1.0) // 衰减分，定期重算，0→候选删除
  frozen         Boolean  @default(false) // true = 不参与衰减（identity_anchor 默认 frozen）

  // 纠错专用
  correctedMemoryId String? // 若本条是纠错记忆，指向被纠正的原记忆 ID

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([category])
  @@index([decayScore])
}

model UserClaim {
  id                   String          @id @default(uuid())
  userKey              String          @default("default-user")
  type                 ClaimType
  key                  String
  valueJson            Json
  confidence           Float
  evidenceCount        Int             @default(0)
  counterEvidenceCount Int             @default(0)
  status               ClaimStatus     @default(CANDIDATE)
  decayRate            Float?
  contextTags          String[]        @default([])
  sourceModels         String[]        @default([])
  lastSourceMessageIds String[]        @default([])
  lastSeenAt           DateTime        @default(now())
  lastPromotedAt       DateTime?
  createdAt            DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt            DateTime        @updatedAt
  evidences            ClaimEvidence[]

  @@index([userKey, type, status])
  @@index([userKey, type, key])
  @@index([updatedAt])
}

model ClaimEvidence {
  id          String           @id @default(uuid())
  claimId     String
  claim       UserClaim        @relation(fields: [claimId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userKey     String           @default("default-user")
  messageId   String?
  sessionId   String?
  snippet     String           @db.Text
  polarity    EvidencePolarity
  weight      Float            @default(1)
  sourceModel String?
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now())

  @@unique([claimId, messageId, polarity])
  @@index([userKey, createdAt])
  @@index([claimId, createdAt])
}

model SessionState {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  userKey     String   @default("default-user")
  sessionId   String
  stateJson   Json
  confidence  Float
  ttlSeconds  Int
  observedAt  DateTime @default(now())
  expiresAt   DateTime
  sourceModel String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([userKey, sessionId, expiresAt])
  @@index([userKey, expiresAt])
  @@index([updatedAt])
}

// Phase2: 人格双池（结构化版）。支持版本化：保存时新建一条、旧条停用（isActive=false）
model Persona {
  id String @id @default(uuid())

  // ── 人格层（稳定注入，几乎不变） ──
  identity          String @default("") @db.Text // 身份定位：我是谁、与用户的关系
  personality       String @default("") @db.Text // 性格特质
  valueBoundary     String @default("") @db.Text // 价值边界：判断原则、记忆哲学
  behaviorForbidden String @default("") @db.Text // 行为禁止项（替代 constraintKeys）

  // ── 表达调度层（常驻但独立，允许更频繁微调） ──
  voiceStyle        String @default("") @db.Text // 语言风格基线
  adaptiveRules     String @default("") @db.Text // 自适应展开/收缩条件
  silencePermission String @default("") @db.Text // 留白与少说许可
  metaFilterPolicy  String @default("") @db.Text // 元过滤规则：禁止暴露内部策略/逻辑

  // ── 进化约束 ──
  evolutionAllowed   String @default("") @db.Text // 允许的进化方向（自然语言）
  evolutionForbidden String @default("") @db.Text // 禁止的进化（自然语言，用于校验）

  // ── 元数据 ──
  version   Int      @default(1) // 版本号，保存时递增
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true) // 是否当前启用；仅一条为 true
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  evolutionLogs PersonaEvolutionLog[]
}

// 人格进化日志：记录每次进化的字段变更，关联到 Persona 版本
model PersonaEvolutionLog {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  personaId String // 写入后的 Persona 版本 ID
  persona   Persona  @relation(fields: [personaId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  field     String // 目标字段名（identity/personality/...）
  content   String   @db.Text // 追加的内容
  reason    String   @db.Text // 变更理由
  version   Int // 写入时的 Persona 版本号
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([personaId])
}

model UserProfile {
  userKey                 String   @id
  preferredVoiceStyle     String   @default("") @db.Text
  praisePreference        String   @default("") @db.Text
  responseRhythm          String   @default("") @db.Text
  impressionCore          String?  @db.Text // 核心印象，固定注入 system prompt，≤150 token
  impressionDetail        String?  @db.Text // 可选细节，按需补充，≤500 token
  pendingImpressionCore   String?  @db.Text // 待确认核心印象
  pendingImpressionDetail String?  @db.Text // 待确认细节印象
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt
}

// 身份锚定：独立于 Memory，始终注入、不衰减、支持多条目
model IdentityAnchor {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  userKey   String   @default("default-user")
  label     String // 'basic' | 'occupation' | 'interest' | 'custom'
  content   String   @db.Text
  sortOrder Int      @default(0)
  nickname  String?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

// 身份锚定变更历史（审计日志）
model IdentityAnchorHistory {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  anchorId        String
  previousContent String   @db.Text
  newContent      String   @db.Text
  changedAt       DateTime @default(now())
}

// 成长层：稳定的认知画像（独立于 Memory，便于长期演化）
model CognitiveProfile {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  kind             String // 'decision_pattern' | 'thinking_pattern' | 'support_preference' | ...
  content          String   @db.Text
  confidence       Float    @default(0.7)
  sourceMessageIds String[] @default([])
  hitCount         Int      @default(0)
  lastAppliedAt    DateTime @default(now())
  isActive         Boolean  @default(true)
  status           String   @default("pending") // 'pending' | 'confirmed' | 'rejected'
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([kind, isActive])
  @@index([updatedAt])
  @@index([status])
}

// 成长层：关系状态快照，按版本演化
model RelationshipState {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  stage            String // 'early' | 'familiar' | 'steady'
  summary          String   @db.Text
  trustScore       Float    @default(0.5)
  closenessScore   Float    @default(0.5)
  rhythmHint       String?
  boundaryNotes    String[] @default([])
  sourceMessageIds String[] @default([])
  hitCount         Int      @default(0)

  JUDGEMENT_PATTERN
  VALUE
  INTERACTION_PREFERENCE
  EMOTIONAL_TENDENCY
  RELATION_RHYTHM
}

enum ClaimStatus {
  CANDIDATE
  WEAK
  STABLE
  CORE
  DEPRECATED
}

enum EvidencePolarity {
  SUPPORT
  CONTRA
  NEUTRAL
}

model Conversation {
  id                     String                  @id @default(uuid())
  title                  String?
  summarizedAt           DateTime?
  /**
   * 默认世界状态（地点/时区/语言等），用于意图补全与推理前提，不写入记忆
   */
  worldState             Json?
  createdAt              DateTime                @default(now())
  updatedAt              DateTime                @updatedAt
  messages               Message[]
  dailyMoments           DailyMoment[]
  dailyMomentSuggestions DailyMomentSuggestion[]
  dailyMomentSignals     DailyMomentSignal[]
}

model Message {
  id             String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId String
  conversation   Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  role           String // 'user' | 'assistant'
  content        String       @db.Text
  tokenCount     Int? // D1: 该消息的估算 token 数（assistant 消息记录 LLM 实际输出 token）
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
}

model Memory {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  type             String // 'mid' | 'long'
  category         String   @default("general") // 'identity_anchor' | 'shared_fact' | 'commitment' | 'correction' | 'soft_preference' | 'general'
  content          String   @db.Text
  shortSummary     String?  @db.Text // 50-100 token 简短摘要，注入时优先使用（Phase3 可选）
  sourceMessageIds String[] // PostgreSQL array for traceability
  confidence       Float    @default(1)

  // 衰减相关
  hitCount       Int      @default(0) // 被召回/引用次数
  lastAccessedAt DateTime @default(now()) // 最后一次被召回的时间
  decayScore     Float    @default(1.0) // 衰减分，定期重算，0→候选删除
  frozen         Boolean  @default(false) // true = 不参与衰减（identity_anchor 默认 frozen）

  // 纠错专用
  correctedMemoryId String? // 若本条是纠错记忆，指向被纠正的原记忆 ID

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([category])
  @@index([decayScore])
}

model UserClaim {
  id                   String          @id @default(uuid())
  userKey              String          @default("default-user")
  type                 ClaimType
  key                  String
  valueJson            Json
  confidence           Float
  evidenceCount        Int             @default(0)
  counterEvidenceCount Int             @default(0)
  status               ClaimStatus     @default(CANDIDATE)
  decayRate            Float?
  contextTags          String[]        @default([])
  sourceModels         String[]        @default([])
  lastSourceMessageIds String[]        @default([])
  lastSeenAt           DateTime        @default(now())
  lastPromotedAt       DateTime?
  createdAt            DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt            DateTime        @updatedAt
  evidences            ClaimEvidence[]

  @@index([userKey, type, status])
  @@index([userKey, type, key])
  @@index([updatedAt])
}

model ClaimEvidence {
  id          String           @id @default(uuid())
  claimId     String
  claim       UserClaim        @relation(fields: [claimId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userKey     String           @default("default-user")

  polarity    EvidencePolarity
  weight      Float            @default(1)
  sourceModel String?
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now())

  @@unique([claimId, messageId, polarity])
  @@index([userKey, createdAt])
  @@index([claimId, createdAt])
}

model SessionState {

  anchorId        String

model CognitiveProfile {

  status           String   @default("pending") // 'pending' | 'confirmed' | 'rejected'
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())

// 成长层：关系状态快照，按版本演化
model RelationshipState {

  sourceMessageIds String[] @default([])

  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([severity])

// 今日日记：表达产物表，不参与长期事实记忆
model DailyMoment {
  id               String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId   String

  triggerMode      String
  title            String
  body             String       @db.Text
  closingNote      String       @db.Text
  moodTag          String?
  sourceSnippetIds String[]     @default([])
  sourceMessageIds String[]     @default([])
  feedback         String?
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@index([feedback])
}

// 今日日记轻提示：偶发触发提示记录
model DailyMomentSuggestion {
  id               String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId   String

  hint             String       @db.Text
  score            Float
  moodTag          String?
  sourceMessageIds String[]     @default([])
  accepted         Boolean      @default(false)
  acceptedAt       DateTime?
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@index([accepted])
}

// 用户对今日日记功能的行为信号（喜欢/尴尬/再写一条/收藏回看）
model DailyMomentSignal {
  id             String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId String
  conversation   Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  type           String
  sourceText     String?      @db.Text
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@index([type])
}

// 工时上报记录：记录通过本工具成功提交的工时
model TimesheetRecord {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  date            DateTime @db.Date
  totalHours      Int      @default(8)
  projectsSummary Json // TimesheetSubmittedProject[]
  submittedAt     DateTime @default(now())
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([date])
  @@index([date])
}

// ── DevAgent ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

// 开发代理会话：一次"帮我改代码"对话
model DevSession {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId String? // 可选：关联发起的聊天会话
  title          String?
  status         String   @default("active") // active | completed | failed | cancelled
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
  runs           DevRun[]
}

// 开发代理执行记录：一次具体的执行动作
model DevRun {
  id           String     @id @default(uuid())
  sessionId    String
  session      DevSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userInput    String     @db.Text
  plan         Json?
  status       String     @default("pending") // pending | running | success | failed
  executor     String? // shell | openclaw | codex
  result       Json?
  error        String?    @db.Text
  artifactPath String?
  startedAt    DateTime?
  finishedAt   DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([sessionId, createdAt])
  @@index([status])
}

  updatedAt        DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@index([feedback])
}

// 今日日记轻提示：偶发触发提示记录
model DailyMomentSuggestion {
  id               String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId   String
  conversation     Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  hint             String       @db.Text
  score            Float
  moodTag          String?
  sourceMessageIds String[]     @default([])
  accepted         Boolean      @default(false)
  acceptedAt       DateTime?
  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@index([accepted])
}

// 用户对今日日记功能的行为信号（喜欢/尴尬/再写一条/收藏回看）
model DailyMomentSignal {
  id             String       @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId String
  conversation   Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  type           String
  sourceText     String?      @db.Text
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@index([type])
}

// 工时上报记录：记录通过本工具成功提交的工时
model TimesheetRecord {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  date            DateTime @db.Date
  totalHours      Int      @default(8)
  projectsSummary Json // TimesheetSubmittedProject[]
  submittedAt     DateTime @default(now())
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([date])
  @@index([date])
}

// ── DevAgent ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

// 开发代理会话：一次"帮我改代码"对话
model DevSession {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid())
  conversationId String? // 可选：关联发起的聊天会话
  title          String?
  status         String   @default("active") // active | completed | failed | cancelled
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt
  runs           DevRun[]
}

// 开发代理执行记录：一次具体的执行动作
model DevRun {
  id           String     @id @default(uuid())
  sessionId    String
  session      DevSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userInput    String     @db.Text
  plan         Json?
  status       String     @default("pending") // pending | running | success | failed
  executor     String? // shell | openclaw | codex
  result       Json?
  error        String?    @db.Text
  artifactPath String?
  startedAt    DateTime?
  finishedAt   DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([sessionId, createdAt])
  @@index([status])
}
